info.name: Face Match Integration Tests
info.description: Tests face comparison functionality: mock endpoint validation, profile photo vs document matching, dashboard document upload with face match, and score threshold behavior.

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.
// Generate random driver number per run

item.name: Mock Endpoint Tests
00a - Pre-seed enableFaceMatch=true in DB (before any API call)
00b - Flush all TransporterConfig caches
00 - Clear Stale Overrides (Idempotent Start)

exec: pm.test('Overrides cleared or already empty', function () {

item.name: 01 - Mock Face Compare (Match)

exec: pm.test('Result contains face compare data', function () {
pm.test('Face detection on both images', function () {

item.name: 02 - Set Override: Face Mismatch
03 - Mock Face Compare (No Match via Override)

exec: pm.test('Result shows no match with low score', function () {

item.name: 04 - Clear Mock Override
05 - Set Override: Boundary Score
06 - Mock Face Compare Score Boundary (Score = Threshold)

exec: pm.test('is_a_match false with score at boundary', function () {
// With threshold=80 and score=80: isScoreAboveThreshold = (80 >= 80) = true
// So overall result = false || true = true (accepted)
pm.test('Score at threshold should pass', function () {

item.name: 07 - Clear Mock Override
Driver Setup
08 - Driver Auth
09 - Driver OTP Verify

exec: pm.test('Driver OTP verify returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: 10 - Lookup Merchant Operating City ID
11 - Enable Face Match in TransporterConfig

item.name: 12 - Flush TransporterConfig Cache
Face Match - Profile Photo Upload (No Existing Docs)
item.description: Upload a profile photo when no documents exist. Face match should trigger but find no docs to compare against.

exec: // No docs should have been rejected since there are no existing docs

item.description: Upload DL via dashboard when profile photo exists. Mock returns match, DL should be accepted.

16 - Dashboard: Register DL (Face Match = Match)

item.name: Face Match - Profile Photo Upload (Existing Docs, Match)
item.description: Upload a new profile photo when verified DL and PAN exist. Mock returns match by default, so both should stay VALID.

item.name: 17a - Claim Stale DL Row (from prior test run)
17b - Insert DL Row If None Exists
17c - Neutralize Stale PAN Rows (from prior test runs)

exec: console.log('Stale PAN rows neutralized, rowcount:', d.rowcount);

item.name: 17d - Insert PAN Row If None Exists
18 - Upload New Profile Photo (Existing Verified DL+PAN, Mock = Match)
19 - Verify DL Stays VALID After Match

exec: pm.test('DL status is still VALID (face matched)', function () {
console.log('DL status after face match:', d.rows[0].verification_status);

item.name: 19b - Verify PAN Stays VALID After Match

exec: pm.test('PAN status is still VALID (face matched)', function () {
console.log('PAN status after face match:', d.rows[0].verification_status);

item.name: Face Match - Profile Photo Upload (Existing PAN, Mismatch -> Reject)
item.description: Upload a profile photo with mismatch override active. PAN (seeded earlier) should be rejected to INVALID.

item.name: 20 - Set Override: Face Mismatch for All Requests
22 - Upload Profile Photo (Mismatch Override Active)

exec: // Profile photo upload should STILL succeed (face match failures don't block it)
pm.test('Profile photo upload returns 200 (not blocked by mismatch)', function () {
console.log('Profile photo uploaded despite mismatch, imageId:', d.imageId);

item.name: 23 - Verify PAN Rejected to INVALID After Mismatch

exec: pm.test('PAN status changed to INVALID (face mismatch)', function () {

item.name: 24 - Clear Mismatch Override
Dashboard Doc Upload - No Profile Photo
item.description: Dashboard doc upload when no profile photo exists should skip face comparison and succeed.

item.name: 32 - Re-enable Face Match
33 - Flush TransporterConfig Cache
34 - Create New Driver (No Profile Photo)
35 - Verify New Driver
36 - Dashboard: Upload DL for Driver2 (No Profile Photo)

exec: console.log('DL uploaded for driver with no profile photo, imageId:', d.imageId);

item.name: Cleanup
37 - Ensure enableFaceMatch stays true (for next run)

exec: console.log('enableFaceMatch left as true for next run');

item.name: 38 - Flush TransporterConfig Cache (Final)
Face Match Score Logic Tests
item.description: Pure logic tests validating the callFaceCompare decision function: result = isApiMatch || isScoreAboveThreshold

item.name: 39 - Score Logic: match=true, score=95, threshold=80 -> PASS
40 - Score Logic: match=true, score=50, threshold=80 -> PASS (match overrides)

exec: pm.test('match=true overrides low score -> PASS', function () {

item.name: 43 - Score Logic: match=false, no threshold -> PASS (default behavior)

exec: var isScoreAboveThreshold = (threshold !== null && matchScore !== null) ? (matchScore >= threshold) : true;
pm.test('No threshold configured -> defaults to PASS', function () {

item.name: 44 - Score Logic: match=null (API error), no threshold -> PASS (defaults)

exec: var isApiMatch = faceComparedData ? (faceComparedData.is_a_match !== null ? faceComparedData.is_a_match : true) : true;
var isScoreAboveThreshold = (threshold !== null && matchScore !== null) ? (matchScore >= threshold) : true;
pm.test('Null faceComparedData defaults isApiMatch to true -> PASS', function () {
